cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is about determining the possible time Andrew went to the clothing store, based on the various alibis from different people. Let me break down the information step by step. First, let's list out all the given time intervals when Andrew was seen doing different activities by others. 1. Andrew woke up at 5 am. That's the starting point. 2. William saw Andrew playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, Andrew was at the tennis court. 3. Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am. So after tennis, he was at the deli from 6 to 9. 4. Tiffany saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So from 9 to 11, he was in Pisa. 5. John saw Andrew waiting at the train station from 11am to 5pm. That's a long time, from 11 AM to 5 PM. 6. Sarah saw him reading at the library from 6pm to 9pm. So after 5 PM, he's at the library until 9 PM. 7. The clothing store was closed after 9 PM. So Andrew had to go there before that.
